title: pavetta johnstonii subsp. johnstonii
intro: Pavetta johnstonii subsp. johnstonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Johnston's Pavetta. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Pavetta johnstonii subsp. johnstonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate inflammation, and provide relief from digestive issues, among others. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
